reference: Hi, thank you for asking. I truly appreciate your concern. This is a functional complaint, and some psychological elements play a role in this. You need to stop thinking about bizarre ideas. In such cases, I typically try tranquilizers, which provide excellent results. It is important to keep your stress level low, and the best option is to take chlordiazepoxide three times a day. I hope this information helps you. Have a nice day.
text: Hi, thank you for asking. I truly appreciate your concern. This is a functional complaint, and some psychological elements play a role in this. You need to stop thinking about bizarre ideas. In such cases, I typically try tranquilizers, which provide excellent results. It is important to keep your stress level low, and the best option is to take chlordiazepoxide 3 times a day. I hope this information helps you. Have a nice day.
